name: lyra-security-containers
description: Container runtime hardening with Podman: rootless + non-root layering, cap-drop=all, read-only rootfs, seccomp/SELinux kept enforcing, userns=auto isolation, socket-mount prohibition, network least privilege, limits as DoS containment, minimal images, scan-and-rebuild lifecycle, and a diagnose-don't-disable debugging ladder. Integrates with lyra-podman-images, lyra-podman-deploy, lyra-security-secrets.
